events.title: NHS ConfedExpo 2026
events.cost: Free for NHS and public sector; commercial paid
events.summary: The UK's largest health and care leadership conference and exhibition, bringing together over 5,000 NHS leaders, policymakers and suppliers across 150-plus sessions.
events.means: This is the room where NHS decision-makers gather, so it is the single best event for understanding system priorities and meeting senior buyers. Worth it for any founder selling into the NHS, but go with a clear plan because the value is in the conversations, not the stand.

events.title: Vis-Ability 2026
events.summary: A conference on eye health, accessibility and opportunity in the UK, covering research and innovation in vision care.
events.means: Niche to eye health and sight loss, so only relevant if your product touches ophthalmology, accessibility or vision. Not a general healthtech event.

events.title: techUK Scotland digital health priorities briefing
events.summary: An online industry briefing on updated Scottish Government priorities for digital health and care following the 2026 elections, and what they mean for procurement and partnerships.
events.means: Worth an hour for anyone selling digital health into Scotland. It gives a direct read on policy direction and procurement appetite from a senior government voice.

events.title: NHS frontline productivity: EPR supplier engagement day
events.organiser: techUK & NHS England Frontline Productivity team
events.summary: An industry engagement day where the NHS England Frontline Productivity team meets Electronic Patient Record suppliers.
events.means: Directly valuable for EPR and clinical software vendors who want face time with the NHS England team shaping frontline productivity. A rare direct line to a national buyer.

events.title: OHT Brighton Monthly Meet-up
events.summary: Monthly Brighton meetup of the One HealthTech community, with a guest speaker.
events.means: Worth it for founders and operators in the South East who want local connections. Informal and free, so a cheap way to test the local ecosystem.

events.title: HPN Midlands and Mental Health 2026
events.cost: Free for senior NHS leaders (invitation and approval required); commercial sponsor packages available
events.summary: An invitation-only, two-day hosted forum connecting senior NHS and ICS digital leaders across the Midlands with solution providers. Topics include digital transformation, AI adoption, the NHS 10-Year Plan, data strategy, mental health integration, and neighbourhood care.
events.means: This is a genuinely senior buyer-facing event. The delegate floor is CIOs, CDIOs, CCIOs and Trust executives, and every supplier gets pre-scheduled one-to-one meetings with them. For a founder wanting direct access to Midlands NHS decision-makers, the sponsorship model is worth examining seriously.

events.title: techUK CareTech Conference 2026
events.summary: A one-day policy conference on digitally enabled adult social care, with a techUK white paper launch and ministerial keynote.
events.means: Best for suppliers focused on social care technology and the policy debate around it. If your market is acute or primary care, the relevance is thinner.

events.title: OHT Better HealthTech by Design: Clinicians + Designers in the NHS
events.summary: An online session on how clinicians and designers can work together to build better health technology inside the NHS.
events.means: Useful for product and design people who want to understand how clinical input shapes NHS-ready products. Free and online, low commitment.

events.title: EBME Expo 2026
events.summary: The UK's main independent exhibition for healthcare technology management, clinical engineering, medical device connectivity and procurement.
events.means: Aimed at clinical and biomedical engineering teams who buy and manage equipment, so it is strong if you sell devices, connectivity or asset management. Free entry makes it low risk.

events.title: Digital Poverty: When Access Isn't Equal
events.summary: A Leeds session on digital exclusion and what unequal access to technology means for health and care.
events.means: Relevant for founders building patient-facing tools who need to think about accessibility and inclusion. More of a policy and ethics discussion than a sales setting.

events.title: Supplier Summit: accelerating digital adoption across UK public authorities
events.summary: The third DSIT and techUK Supplier Summit, bringing senior government leaders and UK tech suppliers together on digital challenges across government.
events.means: Useful for any govtech or healthtech supplier who wants to understand how government buys digital. Broader than health, but the procurement signal is relevant.

events.title: RCR Global AI Conference 2026
events.summary: A clinician-led conference on the practical use of AI in radiology and the wider clinical workflow.
events.means: Highly relevant if your AI product touches imaging, diagnostics or radiology workflows, because the audience is the clinicians who decide what gets deployed.

events.title: Digital Health and AI Conference 2026
events.summary: A King's Fund conference on what it takes to build an AI-enabled health and care system grounded in evidence and real system constraints.
events.means: The audience skews to NHS digital leaders and policy thinkers rather than procurement, so it is good for credibility and senior contacts, less for a sales pipeline.

events.title: CHCFuture 2026: NHS Continuing Healthcare Conference
events.summary: A Convenzis NHS conference on continuing healthcare, bringing NHS leaders and suppliers together.
events.means: Worth it for vendors with continuing healthcare or care coordination products. Convenzis events are buyer-heavy, so good for meeting NHS staff, though sponsor-led.

events.title: HealthTech Integrates 2026
events.location: Refinery at ARC West London, London
events.summary: A one-day event bringing technology, diagnostics, devices and therapeutics organisations together with clinicians and regulators to tackle barriers to adoption.
events.means: Good for medtech and diagnostics founders who want focused conversations about regulation and adoption. Small and senior, so useful for partnerships rather than mass leads.

events.title: NHTeams 2026: NHS Neighbourhood Teams Conference
events.summary: A delivery-focused Convenzis conference on operationalising neighbourhood team models across technology, data and workforce.
events.means: Relevant if your product supports community or neighbourhood care delivery. Good buyer access, in a sponsor-funded format.

events.title: Newsweek AI Health Summit London 2026
events.summary: A one-day summit for senior leaders working on AI implementation across the NHS, with a startup pitch session and executive panels.
events.means: The audience is senior clinicians and executives, and there is a startup pitch slot, so it can suit a founder wanting visibility. Weigh the ticket cost against whether your buyers will be there.

events.title: PrimaryCare+ 2026: NHS Primary Care Transformation Conference
events.summary: A Convenzis conference on primary care transformation, covering technology and service models for general practice and primary care networks.
events.means: Useful for vendors selling into primary care and PCNs. Strong for meeting frontline primary care leaders in one place.

events.title: PatientPath 2026: Optimising NHS Patient Flow
events.summary: A Convenzis conference on improving patient flow and optimising NHS pathways, with NHS speakers and supplier showcases.
events.means: Relevant for patient flow, scheduling and capacity tools. Decent buyer access for vendors in that niche.

events.title: AI, Literacy & Trust: What Communities Need to Know
events.summary: A session on AI literacy and public trust in health, exploring what communities need to understand about AI in care.
events.means: Useful for AI healthtech founders who need to grasp public trust and adoption barriers. Community and education focused rather than commercial.

events.title: Digital Health Summer Schools 2026
events.summary: The NHS IT leadership retreat for current and aspiring CIOs, CCIOs and CNIOs, with peer exchange and leadership development.
events.means: A closed, members-only gathering of NHS digital leaders, so it is not built for selling. Useful to know the network exists and to build relationships with these leaders elsewhere.

events.title: Bring your tech to NHS staff at the Countess of Chester
events.organiser: Highland Marketing & Countess of Chester Hospital
events.summary: A partner event giving technology companies the chance to demonstrate their products directly to NHS staff at the trust.
events.means: Genuinely useful for early-stage vendors who want real frontline feedback and a foot in a trust. Small and hands-on, exactly the kind of access that is hard to get.

events.title: EPR Summit Scotland: the Digital Health and Care Record
events.summary: A Convenzis EPR summit for Scotland, focused on enabling the digital health and care record through data standards.
events.means: Targeted at EPR and record-sharing vendors active in Scotland. A focused room of the right buyers if that is your market.

events.title: Unlocking NHS Scotland procurement for SMEs
events.summary: Part of Glasgow Tech Week, a techUK panel on how SMEs can navigate healthcare procurement in Scotland and scale into NHS adoption.
events.means: Very relevant for smaller vendors trying to crack NHS Scotland. Procurement-specific and SME-focused, exactly the gap most founders struggle with.

events.title: Advanced Therapies Wales Symposium 2026
events.summary: The annual symposium for the advanced therapies and cell and gene therapy community in Wales.
events.means: Very specific to advanced therapies and the Welsh life sciences ecosystem. Relevant only if you work in that space or want a route into Wales.

events.title: Digital Health and Social Care Conference 2026
events.summary: A policy-focused conference on the policies, technologies and developments shaping the future of digital health and social care.
events.means: Good for commercial and policy teams who want the regulatory and strategy picture. Online and policy-led, so more intelligence than networking.

events.title: NetZeroNHS 2026: NHS Sustainability & Innovation Conference
events.summary: A Convenzis conference on NHS sustainability and net zero, covering innovation that helps trusts cut carbon and run greener estates.
events.means: Niche but useful for cleantech and estates innovators selling into the NHS. Skip unless sustainability is central to your offer.

events.title: HETT Show 2026
events.cost: Free for NHS and public sector; commercial paid
events.summary: Healthcare Excellence Through Technology, one of the UK's largest digital health expos with keynotes, multiple stages and a large supplier floor.
events.means: A core event for anyone selling digital health into the NHS. Worth the trip for visibility and leads, though the floor is competitive so pre-booked meetings pay off.

events.title: ABHI Digital Health Conference 2026
events.summary: An ABHI conference themed on moving digital health from policy to practice and scaling adoption across the NHS.
events.means: Senior, policy-led and industry-facing, so good for understanding the commercial and regulatory environment and meeting other healthtech players. Best for context and partnerships.

events.title: OutpatientFutures 2026: NHS Outpatient Innovation Conference
events.summary: A Convenzis conference on outpatient transformation, exploring how to reduce elective backlogs and build resilient community delivery models.
events.means: Relevant for vendors with outpatient, remote monitoring or elective recovery tools. Good buyer concentration in a focused area.

events.title: HPN South 2026
events.location: Radisson Blu Edwardian Hotel, Heathrow, London
events.cost: Free for senior NHS leaders (invitation and approval required); commercial sponsor packages available
events.summary: An invitation-only, two-day hosted forum connecting senior NHS and ICS digital leaders across southern England with solution providers. Peer-led sessions cover digital transformation, AI, data strategy, financial sustainability, and the NHS 10-Year Plan.
events.means: Another genuinely senior buyer crowd with guaranteed pre-booked supplier meetings baked into the format. This is not a trade show floor. Founders sponsoring get structured access to senior NHS decision-makers in the South, which makes it high-value if that geography is a target.

events.title: Health, social care and life sciences policy review: Q3 2026
events.summary: A quarterly online briefing on key digital health policy developments across NHS England, DHSC, the MHRA and NICE, and what they mean for suppliers.
events.means: A high-value, low-cost way to stay current on policy if you sell into the NHS. Genuinely useful for commercial teams tracking what is changing.

events.title: Health Innovation North 2026
events.organiser: Health Innovation North East and North Cumbria
events.summary: A regional health innovation conference showcasing innovations being adopted across the NHS in the North East and North Cumbria.
events.means: Strong if you want a route into the North East and North Cumbria health system or to meet the local innovation team who can help spread a proven product.

events.title: NHS Movement 2026
events.summary: A national conference on how NHS national priorities move from plans to delivery, including digital and joined-up services.
events.means: Useful for understanding NHS reform direction and meeting system leaders. Policy and delivery focused rather than a place for a hard product pitch.

events.title: ABHI UK HealthTech Conference 2026
events.summary: ABHI's flagship two-day conference bringing together industry, government, NHS and regulators for market intelligence and policy updates on UK healthtech.
events.means: The trade body's headline event, valuable for the regulatory and commercial landscape and senior industry networking. Best for context and connections rather than buyer leads.

events.title: EHR Wales: Reflection, Resilience and the Road Ahead
events.summary: A Convenzis electronic health record conference for Wales, reflecting on progress and the road ahead for digital records.
events.means: Useful for EHR and integration vendors targeting NHS Wales. A focused regional room rather than a broad audience.

events.title: GIANT Health Event 2026
events.summary: A health innovation festival of several shows-within-a-show, with 3,000-plus participants and 120-plus speakers across startups, investors and NHS innovators.
events.means: Built for startups and innovators, with pitch and showcase formats. Suits early-stage founders wanting exposure and investor contacts. NHS-buyer density is lower than HETT or ConfedExpo.

events.title: DigiFest Scotland 2026
events.summary: The anchor conference for Scotland's digital health and social care ecosystem, themed around turning ideas into action.
events.means: The right event if Scotland is a target market, gathering the Scottish digital health and care community and its decision-makers. Less relevant if you focus only on NHS England.

events.title: Health, social care and life sciences policy review: 2026 year in review
events.summary: The end-of-year edition of techUK's quarterly digital health policy briefing, recapping developments across NHS England, DHSC, the MHRA and NICE.
events.means: A good catch-up if you missed the quarterly editions. Useful for planning next year's NHS commercial activity around the policy direction.

events.title: Festival of Genomics and Biodata London 2027
events.cost: Free for many roles; commercial paid
events.summary: A large free-to-attend festival covering genomics, biodata and their application across research and the NHS, with a big exhibition.
events.means: Most relevant if your product touches genomics, data or precision medicine, where it draws a serious research and NHS crowd. Free passes make it easy to scout.

events.title: HSJ Digital Transformation Summit 2027
events.summary: A senior leadership summit bringing digital, clinical and operational leaders together on delivery of the NHS 10-Year Digital Plan.
events.means: Strong for vendors who want time with senior NHS digital decision-makers. Invitation and sponsor-led, so plan ahead if you want a presence.

events.title: Digital Health and Care Scotland 2027
events.summary: Scotland's long-running annual digital health and care conference, gathering political voices, health leaders and public and third sector representatives.
events.means: A focused way to reach Scottish health and care leadership and policy figures in one day. Strong if Scotland is on your roadmap.

events.title: Path360 2027: NHS Pathology Strategy Conference North
events.summary: A Convenzis conference on NHS pathology strategy and diagnostics for the North of England.
events.means: Niche, for diagnostics and pathology technology vendors. Highly targeted if that is your sector, otherwise skip.

events.title: Digital Health Rewired 2027
events.cost: Free for NHS and public sector; commercial from £769 + VAT
events.summary: The UK's leading digital health conference and expo, with ten-plus stages of national digital leaders, NHS CIOs, CCIOs, CNIOs, clinicians and a startup pitchfest.
events.means: Alongside ConfedExpo and HETT this is essential for digital health founders, with a real concentration of NHS digital decision-makers and a dedicated startup zone. Book early, it sells out.
